CREATE INDEX presetkey_productid ON Preset_ProductIds(preset_key, product_id)

CREATE TABLE 'Purchasable_Packs_Presets' (`key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `product_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`key_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`product_id`) REFERENCES Purchasable_Packs(product_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Pack_Presets UNIQUE (product_id,name));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Featured` (`key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `featured_idx` INTEGER NOT NULL, `instrument_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`instrument_key`) REFERENCES Instruments(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Featured UNIQUE(preset_key, instrument_key, featured_idx));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Playlist_Presets` ( `preset_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `playlist_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `song_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `idx` INTEGER DEFAULT 0, `uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`preset_key`), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES `Preset_Id`(`key_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`playlist_key`) REFERENCES `Playlists_V2`(`key_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`song_key`) REFERENCES `Playlist_Songs`(`key_id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Characteristics` ( `key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER, `characteristic_key` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`characteristic_key`) REFERENCES Characteristics(key_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Preset_Char UNIQUE (preset_key,characteristic_key));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Id` ( `key_id` INTEGER, `name`	TEXT NOT NULL, `type`	INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `type_v2`	INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `subtype_v2` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `instrument_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sound_designer` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rating` REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, `pack`	INTEGER NOT NULL, `comment` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `file_path` TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, `time_last_save` TEXT NOT NULL, `time_last_open` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `favorite`	INTEGER DEFAULT 0, `instrument_variation_key_id`	INTEGER DEFAULT

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Metadata`(`key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name`  TEXT NOT NULL,`value`  TEXT NOT NULL,PRIMARY KEY(`key_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Metadata UNIQUE (preset_key,name));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Playlists` ( `key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER DEFAULT -1, `playlist_key` INTEGER, `idx` INTEGER DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`playlist_key`) REFERENCES Playlists(key_id) );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_ProductIds` ( `key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `product_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Preset_ProductId UNIQUE (preset_key,product_id));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Recommendation_Coords` ( `key_id` INTEGER, `note_value` INTEGER NOT NULL, `coordinates` BLOB NOT NULL, `file_path` TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(key_id) );
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Recommendation_Names` ( `key_id` INTEGER, `file_path` TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(key_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Preset_Tags_V2` (`preset_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `tag_key` INTEGER NOT NULL, `date_added` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(preset_key, tag_key), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`tag_key`) REFERENCES Tags_V2(key_id))

CREATE TABLE `Preset_Tags` ( `key_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preset_key` INTEGER, `tag_key` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`preset_key`) REFERENCES Preset_Id(key_id), FOREIGN KEY(`tag_key`) REFERENCES Tags(key_id), CONSTRAINT uc_Preset_tags UNIQUE (preset_key,tag_key))

CREATE TABLE `Purchasable_Packs` (`product_id`    INTEGER NOT NULL,`instrument_id` INTEGER DEFAULT 0,`name`  TEXT NOT NULL,`buy_url`  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`baseline`  TEXT NOT NULL,`description`  TEXT NOT NULL,`issued_on` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'not-a-date-time',`price` TEXT,`is_free` INTEGER DEFAULT 0,`preset_count` INTEGER DEFAULT 0,`icons_folder` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`parents` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`title_color` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`bg_color` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`base_price` TEXT DEFAULT '',`is_currently_free` INTEGER DEFAULT 0,`offer_label` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`discount` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`owned` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,`in_cart` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,`is_new` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,`sound_designer` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',`hash` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,PRIMARY KEY(`product_id`,`instrument_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`instrument_id`) REFERENCES Instruments(key_id) );
